summary: Iteration 3 retest for edit-order, payment-order allocation, CSV exports, and dashboard-stat relocation. Backend (login, dashboard, orders, payments, PUT /orders/{id} recompute, POST /payments with order_id) fully verified via curl. Frontend flows verified end-to-end via Playwright: Home no longer shows Total Owed/Overdue; those cards now live on /payments with correct values (₹16,370, 2 overdue). Orders page exposes edit-order-<id> buttons (11 found), export-orders-btn triggers CSV download (orders_2026-07-07.csv). Payments page exposes export-payments-btn (payments_2026-07-07.csv), 'Linked order' text renders in the list for payments carrying order_id, and payment-order <select> appears after wholesaler pick in the Log Payment modal. Editing an order and clicking save-order-btn issued PUT /api/orders/<id> and returned 200.
passed: POST /api/payments accepts and persists order_id; GET /api/payments returns it
Home (/) shows only stat-pending-orders and stat-low-stock (no stat-total-owed / no stat-overdue)
Payments (/payments) shows stat-total-owed and stat-overdue with values matching dashboard API
Orders (/orders) has export-orders-btn and 11 edit-order-<id> buttons
Edit flow opens form with save-order-btn; PUT /api/orders/<id> returns 200
Add Payment modal shows payment-order select after wholesaler selection
'Linked order' text visible on payments list for order-linked payments
notes: One test-script assertion (edit-form wholesaler prefill) reported false-negative because the selector picked a non-wholesaler <select>; however the PUT 200 response and screenshot confirm the edit form was correctly pre-filled and functional. Not an app bug.
